venues.name: Hill Pickleball Courts
venues.surface: Outdoor hard court — dedicated, permanent lines and nets
venues.weather: Mild, marine-influenced — less fog than the coast
venues.notes: Name, court count (6), hours (8am–10pm daily), and free/walk-up model all match the existing 'hill-recreation-pickleball-courts' baseline entry exactly — this is almost certainly the same physical courts. But the baseline's address/coordinates (500 Crescent Drive, 94949; lat 38.0530871, lon -122.5187715) don't match Pickleheads' address (1560 Hill Rd, 94947) or novato.gov's own address for Hill Recreation Area. Separate research turned up that 500 Crescent Drive, Novato is actually the address of a different, unrelated venue called 'Thigpen Courts' (2 tennis courts striped for pickleball, $3 Saturdays only, not listed on Pickleheads and not in the current baseline at all: see https://www.pickleballrush.com/where-to-play/california/novato/thigpen-courts). It looks like the existing baseline record may have picked up Thigpen Courts' address by mistake. Flagging for human review — not resolving here since I can't confirm a precise geocode for 1560 Hill Rd.

venues.name: Bay Club Rolling Hills
venues.surface: Outdoor hard court — dedicated, permanent lines and nets
venues.weather: Mild, marine-influenced — less fog than the coast
venues.notes: Private club; membership required to access pickleball courts, per Pickleheads and bayclubs.com. Not a public/walk-up venue. Coordinates sourced from a third-party property-records aggregator (clustrmaps), not a Pickleheads map pin or direct geocode — treat as approximate despite being address-level.
